genes.verification_source: ITIP Phase C stepAIC Cox regression. Independently cross-checked against published TCGA-COAD prognostic analyses.
genes._note: Verified: CSTB HR=1.42 (95% CI ~1.12-1.80). Higher CSTB expression associated with worse prognosis in TCGA-COAD.

genes.verification_source: Estimated from published TCGA-COAD literature. Requires ITIP Phase C cross-check.
genes._note: TP53 mutation (not expression) is the standard prognostic marker. mRNA-level HR is approximate. Verification needed.

genes.verification_source: Approximate from published immune-oncology studies in CRC. PD-L1 expression may indicate active anti-tumor immune response (favorable in some contexts).
genes._note: PD-L1 expression direction is context-dependent. In MSI-H CRC, high PD-L1 correlates with T-cell infiltration and better prognosis. Verification needed.

meta.pipeline: ITIP Phase C — stepAIC Cox regression
meta.declaration: GT reflects one specific pipeline (ITIP stepAIC Cox). NOT a consensus gold standard. 1/3 genes independently cross-checked. All results are exploratory, conditional on TCGA-COAD.
